question_text: For testing a null hypothesis 𝐻0 against an alternative hypothesis 𝐻1 at level of significance 𝛼∈(0, 1), which of the following statements is correct?

options.A: A uniformly most powerful test always exists
options.B: If a uniformly most powerful test exists then its size is 𝛼
options.C: If a uniformly most powerful unbiased test exists then it is necessarily a uniformly most powerful test
options.D: If a uniformly most powerful test exists then it is necessarily an unbiased test
